description: Multiple buttons share duplicate text with no distinguishing label
expectedBehavior: Each 'Add to Cart' button is uniquely identifiable by product context
actualBehavior: Product listing page renders multiple buttons with identical text 'Add' and no aria-label
testHint: Assert each add-to-cart button has a unique aria-label containing the product name

description: Cart count in nav does not update after adding item
expectedBehavior: Cart badge increments immediately when item is added
actualBehavior: Cart count stays stale until page is refreshed
testHint: Add item to cart and assert [data-testid='cart-count'] increments without reload

description: Price displayed differently on listing vs detail page
expectedBehavior: Price is consistent between product list and product detail views
actualBehavior: Listing shows $29.99, detail page shows $34.99 for the same product
testHint: Read price from listing page, navigate to detail, assert prices match

expectedBehavior: All product images have descriptive alt attributes
actualBehavior: Product images render with empty alt='' or missing alt attribute
testHint: Assert all img elements within [data-testid='product-card'] have non-empty alt attributes

description: Filter state not cleared when navigating back to product list
expectedBehavior: Filter resets to default when user navigates away and returns
actualBehavior: Category filter persists in UI but results are not filtered, causing mismatch
testHint: Apply filter, navigate to detail, go back, assert filter UI matches active results

description: Order history table sorts incorrectly by date
expectedBehavior: Clicking date column sorts orders chronologically
actualBehavior: Orders sort alphabetically by date string instead of chronologically
testHint: Click date sort, assert first row has earliest date and last row has latest date

description: Cart drawer does not trap focus when open
expectedBehavior: Tab key cycles focus within the cart drawer when it is open
actualBehavior: Tab key escapes the cart drawer and reaches background content
testHint: Open cart drawer and assert Tab key does not move focus outside the drawer

description: Success toast fires before backend confirms order
expectedBehavior: Order confirmation toast appears only after API returns 201
actualBehavior: Toast appears immediately on submit click before API response is received
testHint: Intercept POST /api/orders with a delay, assert toast does not appear before response

description: Product grid wraps to single column too early on tablet
expectedBehavior: Two-column grid maintained at 768px viewport width
actualBehavior: Grid collapses to single column at 800px instead of 768px
testHint: Set viewport to 780px and assert product grid has two columns

description: Cart accepts quantity of 0 without error
expectedBehavior: Quantity field rejects values less than 1 with a validation message
actualBehavior: Updating quantity to 0 is accepted and item remains in cart with 0 quantity
testHint: Update cart item quantity to 0 and assert validation error is displayed
